Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Billingsley, Esq. 510-268-8717 Specially appearing for Assignee SACOR FINANCIAL.
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'s Motion To Correct Error In Rejecting Renewal Of Judgment.

Saccor Financial, Inc.'s motion for nunc pro tunc filing of the application for and renewal of judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
